summary: Poorly received show with a lone highlight (Bird Song) and no clear recording details
review: Reviewers found the concert largely unengaging, calling it boring with a weak six‑song first set, though one reviewer singled out Bird Song as a high point. No information about the source or sound quality is provided, so the technical aspect remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Three reviews – one modest (3★) and two very low (0★, 1★) – give an average of ~1.3 stars; the consensus is negative despite a single song mention.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer commented on soundboard, audience mix, or clarity; low overall ratings suggest listeners were dissatisfied, but specific audio issues are not documented.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Criticized as a dull six‑song first set that made the concert feel monotonous; overall pacing described as boring.
